# Nigel Smith — DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure Engineer

> DevOps and cloud infrastructure engineer with a cybersecurity background. Pursuing a B.S. in Cybersecurity at BYU-Idaho (Est. 2027). Based in Idaho Falls, ID. Portfolio at nigel-smith.dev.

## Contact

- Email: nigel.nds.smith@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/nigeld-smith
- GitHub: https://github.com/mynameis-nigel
- Portfolio: https://nigel-smith.dev

## Summary

Nigel Smith is a DevOps and cloud infrastructure engineer who specializes in AWS, Infrastructure as Code, and automation. He brings a security-first perspective to infrastructure work and has hands-on experience migrating production systems, reducing cloud costs, and managing IT environments for small businesses.

## Education

- B.S. Cybersecurity, BYU-Idaho, Rexburg ID — Anticipated July 2027
- Relevant coursework: Network Security, Cloud Architecture, Systems Administration, Cyber Defense

## Work Experience

### Technical Support / Customer Support — Fybercom (March 2026 – Present)
Idaho Falls, ID
- Configures Ubiquiti, Cambium, and Tarana radio and fiber equipment
- Manages CRM systems to analyze customer networks and resolve connectivity issues

### DevOps Intern — Roundsphere (November 2025 – May 2026)
Remote / Athens, GA
- Migrated production applications from legacy operating systems to AWS CloudFormation (IaC)
- Reduced cloud expenditure by 14% through AWS RDS infrastructure audit and consolidation
- Oversaw Google Workspace migrations between organizations

### Cloud & IT Consultant — Full Coverage Tech (May 2023 – Present)
Monroe, GA
- Sole technical point of contact for a managed IT client
- Responsibilities: M365 tenant administration, Exchange triage, endpoint management
- Deployed and configured on-premises network infrastructure including access points and remote access solutions

### Service Desk Associate — The Home Depot (August 2022 – January 2025)
Monroe, GA
- Performed initial triage on Point-of-Sale IT outages and coordinated with corporate IT to restore operations

## Certifications

- ISC² Certified in Cybersecurity (CC) — Earned
- CompTIA A+ — Earned
- CompTIA Security+ — Anticipated July 2026
- AWS Cloud Practitioner — Anticipated July 2026

## Technical Skills

- Languages & Scripting: Python (APIs, data pipelines, automation), PowerShell (M365/AD management, automation), Bash
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS (IAM, EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, VPC, Cognito), GCP (Firebase, IAM, Vertex AI), CloudFormation, IaC, CI/CD
- Infrastructure: Linux (Debian/Ubuntu), Windows Server (2016/2022/2025), Proxmox CTs/VMs, M365 Admin
- Security & Networking: Cisco Devices, Cloudflare DNS/Tunnels, Wireshark, Nmap, SecurityOnion, Ubiquiti, Cambium, Tarana
- AI & Agentic Tooling: Claude Code, Cursor, n8n, Ollama, Openclaw

## Projects

- Full Coverage Technology — Client website built with Next.js, TypeScript, deployed on Vercel
- Walton Tax Professionals — Client website built with Next.js, TypeScript, deployed on Vercel

## Career Goals

- Targeting DevOps, Platform Engineering, and SRE roles at mid-size SaaS companies
- Relocating to Utah (Silicon Slopes area) after graduation
- Building toward AWS Solutions Architect certification
